testsuite.name: co.touchlab.kampkit.BreedViewModelTest

testcase.name: Show API error on refresh without cache
Get updated breeds when stale and preserve favorites
Display API error on first run
Get updated breeds with cache and preserve favorites
Ignore API error on refresh with cache
No web call if data is not stale

testsuite.system-out: Info: (BreedModel) Breeds not fetched from network. Recently updated Verbose: refreshBreeds Error: Error downloading breed list Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: Breed 2: Favorited true Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 3 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 3 breeds into database Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 2 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 0 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: Breed 2: Favorited true Info: (BreedModel) Breeds not fetched from network. Recently updated Verbose: refreshBreeds Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 3 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 3 breeds into database Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 2 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Verbose: refreshBreeds Error: Error downloading breed list Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: Breed 2: Favorited true Info: (BreedModel) Breeds not fetched from network. Recently updated Info: Breed 2: Favorited false Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Verbose: refreshBreeds Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 2 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database Info: (BreedModel) Breeds not fetched from network. Recently updated Verbose: refreshBreeds Verbose: (BreedModel) Breed network result: success Verbose: (BreedModel) Fetched 2 breeds from network Debug: Inserting 2 breeds into database
